design_response: Define a canonical AtomicJsonWriter v1 contract and schemas before implementation; Stage2 will install the shared module and migrate duplicates through a compatibility layer.

duplicated_atomic_helpers_detected.role: bounded subprocess receipts and failure events

root_cause: MetaBlooms has atomic-write behavior embedded in multiple tools rather than a single CDR-critical shared write primitive. That increases policy drift risk for receipts, registries, handoffs, and failure-learning events.
